files.patch:
@@ -34,0 +34,8 @@
+      runs-on:
+        required: false
+        type: string
+        default: 'ubuntu-24.04'
+      bootjdk-platform:
+        required: false
+        type: string
+        default: 'linux-x64'
@@ -78,1 +86,1 @@
-    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
+    runs-on: ${{ inputs.runs-on }}
@@ -93,1 +101,1 @@
-          platform: linux-x64
+          platform: ${{ inputs.bootjdk-platform }}

@@ -37,1 +37,1 @@
-        default: 'linux-x64, linux-x64-variants, linux-cross-compile, alpine-linux-x64, macos-x64, macos-aarch64, windows-x64, windows-aarch64, docs'
+        default: 'linux-x64, linux-x64-variants, linux-aarch64, linux-cross-compile, alpine-linux-x64, macos-x64, macos-aarch64, windows-x64, windows-aarch64, docs'
@@ -67,0 +67,1 @@
+      linux-aarch64: ${{ steps.include.outputs.linux-aarch64 }}
@@ -185,0 +186,1 @@
+          echo "linux-aarch64=$(check_platform linux-aarch64 linux aarch64)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
@@ -210,0 +212,14 @@
+  build-linux-aarch64:
+    name: linux-aarch64
+    needs: prepare
+    uses: ./.github/workflows/build-linux.yml
+    with:
+      platform: linux-aarch64
+      runs-on: 'ubuntu-24.04-arm'
+      bootjdk-platform: linux-aarch64
+      gcc-major-version: '14'
+      configure-arguments: ${{ github.event.inputs.configure-arguments }}
+      make-arguments: ${{ github.event.inputs.make-arguments }}
+      dry-run: ${{ needs.prepare.outputs.dry-run == 'true' }}
+    if: needs.prepare.outputs.linux-aarch64 == 'true'
+
@@ -434,0 +450,13 @@
+  test-linux-aarch64:
+    name: linux-aarch64
+    needs:
+      - prepare
+      - build-linux-aarch64
+    uses: ./.github/workflows/test.yml
+    with:
+      platform: linux-aarch64
+      bootjdk-platform: linux-aarch64
+      runs-on: ubuntu-24.04-arm
+      dry-run: ${{ needs.prepare.outputs.dry-run == 'true' }}
+      debug-suffix: -debug
+

@@ -140,1 +140,1 @@
-# Param2 - _nocoops, _coh, _nocoops_coh, or empty
+# Param2 - _nocoops, _nocoh, _nocoops_nocoh, or empty
@@ -146,2 +146,2 @@
-    $1_$2_COH_OPTION := -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions \
-                        $(if $(findstring _coh, $2),-XX:+UseCompactObjectHeaders,-XX:-UseCompactObjectHeaders)
+    $1_$2_NOCOH_OPTION := -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions \
+                        $(if $(findstring _nocoh, $2),-XX:-UseCompactObjectHeaders,-XX:+UseCompactObjectHeaders)
@@ -149,2 +149,2 @@
-  $1_$2_$3_DUMP_EXTRA_ARG := $$($1_$2_COOPS_OPTION) $$($1_$2_COH_OPTION) $(if $(findstring _preview, $3), --enable-preview,)
-  $1_$2_$3_DUMP_TYPE      := $(if $(findstring _nocoops, $2),-NOCOOPS,)$(if $(findstring _coh, $2),-COH,)$(if $(findstring _preview, $3),-PREVIEW,)
+  $1_$2_$3_DUMP_EXTRA_ARG := $$($1_$2_COOPS_OPTION) $$($1_$2_NOCOH_OPTION) $(if $(findstring _preview, $3), --enable-preview,)
+  $1_$2_$3_DUMP_TYPE      := $(if $(findstring _nocoops, $2),-NOCOOPS,)$(if $(findstring _nocoh, $2),-NOCOH,)$(if $(findstring _preview, $3),-PREVIEW,)
@@ -206,1 +206,1 @@
-    ifeq ($(BUILD_CDS_ARCHIVE_COH), true)
+    ifeq ($(BUILD_CDS_ARCHIVE_NOCOH), true)
@@ -208,2 +208,2 @@
-        $(eval $(call CreateCDSArchive,$v,_coh)) \
-        $(eval $(call CreateCDSArchive,$v,_coh,_preview)) \
+        $(eval $(call CreateCDSArchive,$v,_nocoh)) \
+        $(eval $(call CreateCDSArchive,$v,_nocoh,_preview)) \
@@ -212,2 +212,2 @@
-        $(eval $(call CreateCDSArchive,$v,_nocoops_coh)) \
-        $(eval $(call CreateCDSArchive,$v,_nocoops_coh,_preview)) \
+        $(eval $(call CreateCDSArchive,$v,_nocoops_nocoh)) \
+        $(eval $(call CreateCDSArchive,$v,_nocoops_nocoh,_preview)) \

@@ -992,5 +992,0 @@
-  ifneq ($$(findstring -XX:+UseCompactObjectHeaders, $$(JTREG_ALL_OPTIONS)), )
-    JTREG_AUTO_PROBLEM_LISTS += ProblemList-coh.txt
-  endif
-
-

@@ -2796,2 +2796,3 @@
-      // A special case like "DMB ST;DMB LD;DMB ST", the last DMB can be skipped
-      // We need check the last 2 instructions
+      // A special case like "DMB ST;DMB LD;DMB ST", the last DMB can be skipped.
+      // We need to check the second-to-last instruction, only if it is inside
+      // the current code section.
@@ -2799,1 +2800,1 @@
-      if (last != code()->last_label() && nativeInstruction_at(prev2)->is_Membar()) {
+      if (prev2 >= begin() && last != code()->last_label() && nativeInstruction_at(prev2)->is_Membar()) {

@@ -1874,5 +1874,6 @@
-  // CopyAVX3Threshold is the threshold at which 64-byte instructions are used
-  // for implementing the array copy and clear operations.
-  // The Intel platforms that supports the serialize instruction
-  // have improved implementation of 64-byte load/stores and so the default
-  // threshold is set to 0 for these platforms.
+  // CopyAVX3Threshold is the threshold at which 64-byte vector instructions
+  // are used for implementing the array copy, fill and clear operations.
+  // The Intel platforms that support the serialize instruction and the AMD
+  // platforms with native 512-bit datapath have improved implementation of
+  // 64-byte load/stores and so the default threshold is set to 0 for these
+  // platforms.
@@ -1882,0 +1883,2 @@
+    } else if (is_amd() && is_amd_avx512_datapath_server_family()) {
+      FLAG_SET_DEFAULT(CopyAVX3Threshold, 0);

@@ -3972,1 +3972,1 @@
-    "AndV", "OrV", "XorV",
+    "AndV", "OrV", "XorV", "AndVMask", "OrVMask", "XorVMask",

@@ -157,0 +157,1 @@
+  bool    _compatible_oop_compression;            // value of AOTCompatibleOopCompression at dump time
@@ -238,0 +239,1 @@
+  bool compatible_oop_compression()        const { return _compatible_oop_compression; }

@@ -953,0 +953,7 @@
+// C2 uses runtime stubs serialized generation to initialize its static tables
+// shared by all compilations, like Type::_shared_type_dict.
+// At least one stub have to be completely generated to execute intialization
+// before we can skip the rest stubs generation by loading AOT cached stubs.
+
+static bool c2_do_stub_init_complete = false;
+
@@ -1028,1 +1035,1 @@
-  {
+  if (c2_do_stub_init_complete) {
@@ -1073,0 +1080,4 @@
+
+  // First successful stub generation will set it to `true`
+  // and it will stay `true` after that.
+  c2_do_stub_init_complete = c2_do_stub_init_complete || (_stub_entry_point != nullptr);

@@ -127,1 +127,5 @@
-  product(bool, UseCompactObjectHeaders, false,                             \
+  product(bool, AOTCompatibleOopCompression, false, DIAGNOSTIC,             \
+          "Always use HeapBasedNarrowOop mode, so that AOT code will "      \
+          "always work regardless of runtime heap range")                   \
+                                                                            \
+  product(bool, UseCompactObjectHeaders, true,                              \
@@ -145,0 +149,1 @@
+const bool AOTCompatibleOopCompression = false;
@@ -1229,1 +1234,1 @@
-          "When using recompilation, never interpret methods "              \
+          "(Deprecated) When using recompilation, never interpret methods " \
@@ -1946,0 +1951,3 @@
+  develop(bool, ForceSingleFrameThaw, false,                                \
+          "Force thawing one frame at a time")                              \
+                                                                            \

@@ -65,2 +65,0 @@
-compiler/vectorapi/TestVectorLongToMaskNodeIdealization.java 8384428 generic-x64
-

@@ -473,2 +473,2 @@
-java/nio/channels/SocketChannel/CloseDuringConnect.java         8375658 macosx-26.0,macosx-26.1,macosx-26.2,macosx-26.3
-java/nio/channels/SocketChannel/OpenLeak.java                   8375658 macosx-26.0,macosx-26.1,macosx-26.2,macosx-26.3
+java/nio/channels/SocketChannel/CloseDuringConnect.java         8375658 macosx-26.0,macosx-26.1,macosx-26.2,macosx-26.3,macosx-26.4,macosx-26.5
+java/nio/channels/SocketChannel/OpenLeak.java                   8375658 macosx-26.0,macosx-26.1,macosx-26.2,macosx-26.3,macosx-26.4,macosx-26.5

+sun/jvmstat/monitor/MonitoredVm/MonitorVmStartTerminate.java 8378881 windows-x64
+
